data.title: Dogecoin Admits Its A Joke Alright, But You Can Take The 16100% Gains Seriously
data.description: Dogecoin, a meme-based cryptocurrency, proclaimed itself the most enduring and successful financial "joke" in history, emphasizing its origins as a meme. The virtual currency, known as the "Highest-Grossing Joke," highlighted its meme roots in a recent post, asserting its status as a significant financial joke. Originally created in 2013 based on the popular Shiba Inu meme, Dogecoin has experienced an impressive increase of 16104.52%. Currently, its market capitalization exceeds $13 billion, surpassing that of Domino's Pizza Inc. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: OwlTing Group (NASDAQ: OWLS) Receives US$10 Million Investment with up to US$50 Million in Total Funding Available Upon Mutual Consent
data.description: OwlTing Group, listed on NASDAQ as OWLS, has successfully obtained a convertible investment of $10 million. This investment includes a provision for potentially receiving up to $50 million in overall funding. The purpose of this funding is to facilitate the global expansion of OwlPay, a service offered by OwlTing Group.
March composite PMI for the UAE stands at 52.9, compared with 55.0 in February, S&P Global reports.

data.title: KuCoin Named Only Global Exchange to Participate in CBN Virtual Asset Supervisory Pilot, Reinforcing Global Compliance Strategy
data.description: In Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands, on April 2, 2026, KuCoin, a reputable international cryptocurrency platform focused on reliability, has been selected to take part in a trial oversight initiative initiated by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) that aims at supervising Virtual Asset Service Providers (VASPs).
Vietnamese fuel company Petrolimex inks MOU with GGENTEC of South Korea for a waste-to-oil plant.
Myanmar parliament kicks off the presidential vote, with proceedings broadcast live.
FT reports that the EU Energy Commissioner says the bloc may implement fuel rationing or release oil from strategic reserves as part of its options.

data.title: Circle is set to launch cirBTC, a wrapped Bitcoin product, to compete with BitGo and Coinbase. The move comes as Circle expands into Bitcoin for institutional investors, alongside its stablecoin offerings like USDC and EURC.
data.description: Circle, a company renowned for creating stablecoins like USDC and EURC, is diversifying its business by venturing into the Bitcoin market. The focus of this expansion is geared towards catering to institutional clients.

South Korea and France are aligned on the importance of preserving peace on the Korean Peninsula, says Lee.
